name: Biocon Limited
summary: Biocon Limited, a biopharmaceutical company, manufactures pharmaceuticals, and medicinal chemical and botanical products. The company operates through Small Molecules, Biologics, Branded Formulations, and Research Services segments. It focuses in the areas of diabetes, oncology, immunology, dermatology, ophthalmology, neurology, rheumatology, and inflammatory diseases. The company provides biosimilars comprising recombinant human insulin, insulin glargine, biosimilar trastuzumab, and other biopharmaceuticals; small molecules, such as active pharmaceutical ingredients and generic formulations; and branded formulation products under the Insugen, Basalog, BIOMAb EGFR, CANMAb, and ALZUMAb brands. It is also involved in the integrated discovery, development, and manufacturing services for small and large molecules, antibody-drug conjugates, and oligonucleotides. The company serves customers in approximately 120 countries. Biocon Limited was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Bengaluru, India.
